description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a spacious, landscaped lot featuring a large green lawn, a fenced perimeter, and a variety of trees and shrubs. The main structure is a single-story building with a dark, gabled roof and white exterior walls, complemented by large windows and a prominent front entrance. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool, a paved patio area, and a detached garage or outbuilding. A driveway leads from the street to the garage, and a covered porch is visible at the front of the house. The property is bordered by tall hedges and trees, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on outdoor living and open space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark gabled roof, white walls, large windows, a front porch, and a backyard pool, set within a landscaped, tree-lined lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, gabled roof, front porch, and driveway leading to the garage, with trees lining the back of the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the backyard pool, patio area, and the detached garage or outbuilding on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio, and the back facade of the bungalow, with trees and hedges providing privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side windows, and the landscaped yard with a pink-roofed structure and dense tree line.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and sides
